feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Choose the incorrect information about the exception hierarchy in ABAP.
entry.content:
In this question, I doesn't know the answer? Anyone help me?
(Choose 1 answer)
Choose the incorrect information about the exception hierarchy in ABAP.
A. Every exception class offers a range of standard methods and attributes are derived from the subclass CX_ROOT.
B. All exception classes must be derived from one of the classes CX_STATIC_CHECK,CX_DYNAMIC_CHECK or CX_NO_CHECK.
C. The classes CX_STATIC_CHECK, CX_DYNAMIC_CHECK, CX_NO_CHECK are subclasses of superclass CX_ROOT.
D. None of the others.

entry.title: Is it advisable to create all classic APIs for Tier 2 ABAP Cloud Development in single class?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement to create multiple APIs for tier2 to consume the same in Tier1. Is it advisable to create all the wrapper objects in a single class as a separate method or should we go with individual wrapper class for each classic API?

Regards,

Ram Peddireddi

entry.title: Graduate Student Programs for SAP Certification - Seeking Advice
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently pursuing my Master's in Information Systems and have about 5 years of experience as an ABAP Developer.

As I continue my academic journey, I'm looking to enhance my credentials with the SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud  and SAP Fiori Application Developer certification. I'm specifically interested in:

  • Are there any special programs or discounts available for graduate students pursuing SAP certifications
  • Does SAP offer any university alliance programs that provide certification opportunities?
  • Has anyone here completed this certification while being a student? If so, what was your experience like?
  • Any recommendations on the best preparation resources for this certification that are budget-friendly for students?
  • Are there any mentorship programs available for students aiming to specialize in SAP development?

Additionally, if there are any specific grants, scholarships, or corporate sponsorship programs that support SAP certification for graduate students, I'd appreciate that information as well.

I believe this certification would strengthen my professional credentials and prior industry experience, making me more competitive in the job market as I advance my career in SAP development.

Thank you in advance for your insights and advice!

Best regards,
Kavyasri

entry.title: Public cloud CDS views (maintenance order & operation)
entry.content:
Dear team, for public cloud I need maintenance order and operation CDS view. please suggest some CDS view.

Thanks.

@aoyang

entry.title: EML : Business Object Interface Exception Handling
entry.content:
Dear All

Please support that how to read messages returned by Business Object Interface programmatically.

We can read the response through debugging, but how to read same using ABAP.

 In below code

REPORTED DATA(reported)

OR

is having %MSG having the error message but final structure is only available at runtime.

MODIFY ENTITY I_ProductionOrderTP
CREATE FIELDS ( 
 product
 productionplant
 productionversion
 productionordertype
 orderplannedtotalqty
 productionunit
 basicschedulingtype
 )
AUTO FILL CID WITH VALUE #(
 (
 %data-product = 'FG228'
 %data-productionplant = '1010'
 %data-productionversion = '0001'
 %data-productionordertype = 'YBM1'
 %data-orderplannedtotalqty = 5
 %data-productionunit = 'ST'
 %data-basicschedulingtype = '4'
 )
 )
FAILED DATA(failed)
REPORTED DATA(reported)
MAPPED DATA(mapped).

IF failed IS INITIAL.
 COMMIT ENTITIES BEGIN
 RESPONSES
 FAILED DATA(failed_commit)
 REPORTED DATA(reported_commit).

 IF sy-subrc = 0 AND failed_commit IS INITIAL.
 CONVERT KEY OF i_productionordertp
 FROM TEMPORARY VALUE #( %pid = mapped-productionorder[ 1 ]-%pid
 %tmp = mapped-productionorder[ 1 ]-%key )
 TO FINAL(ls_finalkey).
 ENDIF.
 COMMIT ENTITIES END.

 " Number of created Order: ls_finalkey-productionorder

ELSE.
 ROLLBACK ENTITIES.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Unable to read repository at https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest/content.xml.xz.
entry.content:
When we try to install ADT on eclipse platform we are getting this error  :-
Unable to read repository at https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest/content.xml.xz.
Unable to read repository at https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest/content.xml.xz.
PKIX path building failed: sun.security.provider.certpath.SunCertPathBuilderException: unable to find valid certification path to requested target
how to resolve it?

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud – Sales Order Image Attachments on Adobe Form
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility  @SAP SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database @ABAP @SAPCloud 

Dear All,

I’m currently working on a requirement in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud where I need to retrieve image attachments from a sales order or return order and display them on an Adobe Print Form.

Has anyone implemented a similar solution or come across any useful blogs or documentation that can guide this process?

Any suggestions, references, or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

 

Regards,

Muhammad Taqi

entry.title: Unable to Create/Post STO Purchase order Using BO/API
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We're trying to post a STO Purchase Order using Standard API & same we try with business object, But we get a error of (MessageClass='APPL_MM_PUR_PO',MessageNumber='065'  Short Text = Use a supported purchase order item category for item &. See long text.) 

please help with this to find out the way to resolve this.

 

Link - https://my418769-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_purchaseorder_2/srvd_a2x/sap/purchaseorder/0001/PurchaseOrder

Payload - 
{
    "CompanyCode": "1000",
    "PurchaseOrderType": "UD",
    "Supplier": "1004",
    "PurchasingOrganization": "1000",
    "PurchasingGroup": "003",
    "_PurchaseOrderItem": [
        {
            "Plant": "1007",
            "OrderQuantity": 7,
            "NetPriceAmount": 0,
            "NetPriceQuantity": 1,
            "PurchaseOrderItemCategory": "7",
            "TaxCode": "2E",
            "DocumentCurrency" : "",
            "OrderPriceUnit" : "",
            "PurchaseOrderQuantityUnit" : " "
           
        }
    ]
}

entry.title: How sorting works in an internal table in given case??
entry.content:
Hello,

I know this would be basic question, but I need this to figure-out issue. I have an internal table lt_result with four fields (field1, field2, field3, field4). I have fetched data from an Infotype into this internal table. Now, I have N no.of records in lt_result. Among these, I have two records with same value in field2 where field4 is varied.

EG: Before SORT

field1field2field3field4
1234501.01.201301.01.201301.04.2012
1234504.11.202004.11.202004.11.2020
1234520.12.202220.12.202201.04.2012
1234520.12.202220.12.202204.11.2020

I would like to sort with field1 ascending and field2 descending.

SORT lt_result BY <field1> ASCENDING <field2> DESCENDING.

In that case, what will happen if for the records in violet.

i) which record will come first either 01.04.2012 or 04.11.2020?

ii) usually how does sorting works for date comparison?

Thanks!!

entry.title: How can I make non-key field columns editable on Fiori Element List report?
entry.content:
Hi, 

I need SM30 functionality for TVARVC table in Fiori application using RAP model. I need Create, Edit, Delete option in the List itself without going to Object page as I need multi-line edit option.

Please let me know if anyone has implemented SM30 functionality using RAP?

Thanks,

BK

entry.title: Automating S/4HANA Cloud UI Deployment via CI/CD Pipeline
entry.content:
I'm currently developing an OnStack Extension on the S/4HANA Public Cloud. This includes a UI generated using SAP Fiori Elements. The development takes place in VSCode. For deployment to the S/4HANA Cloud, the @SAP/ux-ui5-tooling npm package is used, specifically the command fiori deploy --config ui5-deploy.yaml.

The current ui5-deploy.yaml looks as follows:

specVersion: "3.1"
metadata:
  name: xxx
type: application
builder:
  customTasks:
    - name: ui5-tooling-transpile-task
      afterTask: replaceVersion
      configuration:
        debug: true
        transformModulesToUI5:
          overridesToOverride: true
    - name: deploy-to-abap
      afterTask: generateCachebusterInfo
      configuration:
        target:
          url: xxx
          authenticationType: reentranceTicket
        app:
          name: xxx
          description: xxx
          package: xxx
          transport: xxx
        exclude:
          - /test/
          - /*.ts
  resources:
    excludes:
      - /test/**
      - /localService/**

This means that the deployment is currently executed in the user context using a reentrance ticket. Now, I want to automate the deployment via a CI/CD pipeline (either Azure DevOps or SAP CI/CD Service).

The challenge is that a reentrance ticket cannot be generated in an automated context. My idea was to use a technical user, but I couldn’t find a suitable Communication Scenario that would support this kind of deployment.

What would be the best way to accomplish this?

entry.title: CDS View for Equipment Partner Functions, A_EquipmentPartner
entry.content:
Hi everone,

I am looking for a CDS View containing Equipment / Technical Object Partner information, like A_EquipmentPartner or displayed in https://myxxx.s4hana.cloud.sap/ui#MaintenanceObject-display?sap-ui-tech-hint=WDA

This crutial to report equipments by customer and thus sales representative etc.

Thank you and best regards
Tim

entry.title: Regarding cross Tier , Cross 'ABAP Language" Cloud development
entry.content:
While implementing a classic unreleased BADI we plan to write the core logic in a Tier-1 Class ( use Tier-2 wrapper class to wrap any unreleased objects). Once we have this logic in a  Tier-1 class , we plan to call this method in  the classical Tier-3 BADI. This is to avoid/decrease technical debt once this classical BADI cloud released. Do you see any issues with this approach (cross Tier, cross "ABAP language) on the upgrade stability?

This is on S4HANA 2023 , Basis version 758 SP 02

Do you have any documentation ( Note, KBA or blog) to support this approach?

entry.title: Multiple datasources for custom Adobe Form
entry.content:
In S/4HANA Public Edition, you can create custom forms. This works great as long as you can use the SAP standard data providers (IDP). You can see where this is going... we can't use those, our data selection is completely custom and involves several data sources.

In this scenario you have no alternatives but to take control and build everything in a piece of custom coding. In our case, due to the need for other on-stack features/APIs, we built this code on stack as well. This is all still in a Public Edition environment.

A large part of the process is perfectly explained in this blog:
SAP Forms service by Adobe in SAP BTP, ABAP environment

There are several steps required to eventually get to the PDF form. A connection to the template store on BTP, a reference to a data service which exposes a CDS view, and of course in the end a method to combine form layout with form data. Very basic versions of all these steps are in place and do work.

" This creates the MT_OUTLINE structure that contains the data layout
data(lo_fdp_util) = cl_fp_fdp_services=>get_instance( 'ZSD_customform' ).

" Based on the key, this should always return a single top level record
data(lv_data) = lo_fdp_util->read_to_data( lt_keys ).     " In readable data format
data(lv_xml)  = lo_fdp_util->read_to_xml_v2( lt_keys ).   " In XML format
data(lv_xsd)  = lo_fdp_util->get_xsd_v2( ).               " In XSD schema format

Now comes the tricky bit. Besides having a CDS view as data source, we require to query an external data source as well. When loading the initial data service, SAP generates the data structure for you. Very convenient and it saves you the trouble of manually building the XML and XSD. This of course only includes the fields known to the data service, not the ones from the external data source.

What would be a sensible solution here? Manually creating the XSD feels wrong in every way. How can we integrate both data sources into a working XML file (for actual data) and XSD schema (for data layout)? That schema can then be uploaded to the template store.

entry.title: HelloI need some help in Aggregating rows where i am getting cumulative aggregation
entry.content:
Hello

 

I need some help in Aggregating rows where i am getting cumulative aggregation per position groups. Foe example if i have 4 rows of values to aggregated and its position as 3 then its adding all the rows and assigning the value then again adding the result with the 2nd , 3rd, and 4th row and again the results with 3rd and 4th and again with the 4th , its aggregating as much as row of the position.

*if lv_cityp is not initial and lv_vusta = 'started'.
*  read table lt_filtered assigning <ls_filtered> with key zxxmewait = lv_wait.
*  if sy-subrc = 0.
*    <ls_filtered>-duration = <ls_filtered>-duration + lv_dur.
*
*    else.
*      ls_filtered-zxxmewait = lv_wait.
*      ls_filtered-duration = lv_dur.
*      insert ls_filtered into table lt_filtered.
*      endif.  if anyone can help with that it would be really great. Thanks

entry.title: BP is not creating with respect to new customer creation
entry.content:
I used the class CMD_EI_API and the method MAINTAIN_DIRECT_INPUT to pass customer data into the deep structure. It successfully updated the customer in table KNA1, but the Business Partner (BP) was not created. I checked the BP records and confirmed it wasn’t generated. Please let me know how to resolve this

   CALL METHOD cmd_ei_api=>maintain_direct_input
      EXPORTING
        iv_collect_messages  = gc_x
        is_master_data       = ls_customer
      IMPORTING
        es_message_defective = ls_error.

entry.title: Direct API call from SAP S/4 HANA public cloud to third party cloud system without Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are working on requirement to integrate SAP and non-SAP system. We have SAP S/4 HANA public cloud edition through which we need to do API call (GET/POST), provided by third party cloud system. I understand we can achieve same with SAP 'Integration suite service' (hosted on SAP BTP account) but in our case it is not an option to do so.

We are looking to do Direct API call ( like how can we do on ECC or S/4 on premise system, by using SM59 HTTP connection and using cl_http* class) .

But can we achieve same with SAP S/4 HANA public cloud edition without any integration (middleware) system?

It would be very helpful if someone has any insights regarding this.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: ABAP Extensibility tutorial : Create a Shopping Cart Business Object
entry.content:
Been following Tutorial Create a Shopping Cart Business Object

This should create a simple UI for the cart in our 3-tier SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.  This is done via Eclipse IDE and is connected to our SAP S/4 Development client.  This has nothing at all to do with BTP ABAP (we don't even have that installed)

I can create the Table in the Eclipse IDE.  I know the Table now exists in SAP S/4 (as I wrote a simple OO ABAP class running in console to check ! ).

But the on Right-click the created database table to Generate ABAP Repository Objects is not going to Generate any object .  Why so !?.

Generate ABAP Repository Objects.Does not Generate anythingat least I know my DB Table exists

entry.title: Is there any way to use se38 report in SAP public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Scenario: I'm using sflight table but its delivered empty record. So, sap help portal suggesting use SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR report. problem is SAP public cloud is not allowing to execute reports (SE38). is there any way to use SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR?

Regards,

Nirojan.

entry.title: Clean core in PP-DS and AATP in S/4HANA PCE: how much is possible?
entry.content:
Hi, I am seeking for some guidance in clean core for PP-DS and AATP in S/4HANA PCE. I was triggered by this blog on EWM and clean core. And was wondering if there are similar considerations for AATP and PPDS in S/4HANA PCE?

It is about the following:

My customer is doing the brownfield conversion from ECC to S/4 RISE with doing "greenfield" PP-DS and AATP in their S/4, moving away from APO. However, they did a lot of developments (140 objects touched and specific heuristics created). Most of them, they are taking them over in S/4 and doing the code remediation. How can we do the code remediation as best possible according to clean core principles? And how much is possible in the areas of PP-DS and AATP (referring to what EWM can only do)

Many thanks for your feedback, 

Kind regards, 

Goedele
